title: Xiphion ochroleucum
uses: Xiphion ochroleucum is known to have various medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. intro: Xiphion ochroleucum, also known as the white flag or yellow flag lily, is a species of flowering plant in the asparagus family (Asparagaceae) native to southern Europe and the Mediterranean region. The health benefits of Xiphion ochroleucum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs.
